name: The Star Always Follow You
original_name: Lấp Lánh Tựa Ánh Sao Trời
overview: Because he failed college so many times, Dang, a city dude, was taken back to his hometown by his mother to study under a village teacher. Here, Dang had the opportunity to meet and get to know people living in the village and learned many meaningful lessons that made his life seem to take a different turn.
